name: @valve-tech/example-multi-chain-gas
description: Static web app: watch several EVM chains' fee markets side by side and get alerted on thresholds. One @valve-tech/chain-source + @valve-tech/gas-oracle pipeline per chain runs concurrently; a compare table lines the chains' tiers up per block, and user-defined threshold rules (e.g. 'fast tip below 2 gwei on Ethereum') fire edge-triggered in-app + browser notifications. No wallet — public RPCs only.
